info.title: The Master Box
info.lead: The Master Box is our exclusive original packaging, designed for serious longevity enthusiasts, large families and visionary companies. Replace the sugary office energy drinks — the ones that briefly spike your team and crash them into fatigue — with genuine cellular energy. Our Tent Selection delivers over 190 bioactive compounds and the rare Omega-7 fatty acid for crystal-clear focus and lasting performance.
info.advantageBody: By choosing the original box you let us bypass unnecessary logistics steps. We pass that efficiency directly on to you: you save over 25% compared with single-bottle purchases and ensure the daily protective ritual never pauses — for you or your team.
info.scienceItem1: 20 × 250 ml of the purest, cold-pressed organic essence (Tent Selection).
info.scienceItem2: Yields up to 60 litres of revitalising premium beverage.
info.scienceItem3: The ideal corporate wellness solution for your company.
info.scienceItem4: Free premium shipping directly from our logistics centre in Aarau.
info.shippingText: Free premium shipping within Switzerland. Direct dispatch from our logistics centre in Aarau.
